name: Supply Chain Optimizer
description: Diagnose and improve supply-chain performance across sourcing, inventory, production, fulfillment, logistics, and resilience by finding the real constraint, quantifying cost-service-cash tradeoffs, and recommending policy changes teams can actually run.
not_for: ERP or planning-system configuration as the primary task
customs, duties, sanctions, trade compliance, or legal shipping advice
pure demand forecasting with no operating-policy decision
warehouse layout or industrial-engineering detail as the main problem
finance-only savings narratives that ignore service or execution reality
typical_inputs: service promise, OTIF/fill-rate goals, and business priorities
demand pattern, forecast error, seasonality, and SKU segmentation
supplier count, MOQs, lead times, and lead-time variability
inventory posture, stockout/expedite behavior, and working-capital constraints
risk exposure, concentration points, and recovery options
